name: @dpo2u/client-sdk
description: TypeScript client for dpo2u-solana — on-chain compliance primitives (LGPD/GDPR/DPDP), AES-GCM encrypted storage, MCP REST client for audit/docs toolkit, and OAuth login via `dpo2u-cli login`. Build on Solana.

scripts.copy-idls: mkdir -p dist/idl && cp ../../solana-programs/target/idl/compliance_registry.json dist/idl/ 2>/dev/null; cp ../../solana-programs/target/idl/consent_manager.json dist/idl/ 2>/dev/null; cp ../../solana-programs/target/idl/popia_info_officer_registry.json dist/idl/ 2>/dev/null; cp ../../solana-programs/target/idl/ccpa_optout_registry.json dist/idl/ 2>/dev/null; cp ../../solana-programs/target/idl/pipeda_consent_extension.json dist/idl/ 2>/dev/null; cp ../../solana-programs/target/idl/pipa_korea_zk_identity.json dist/idl/ 2>/dev/null; echo 'IDL copy done'

author: DPO2U <hello@dpo2u.com>
